title: DarkBindings
description: Craft non-vanilla recipes including Diamond, Emerald, Iron, Bell, Saddles, Horse Armor, Anvil Repair, Chainmail, and much more!
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkBindings


A simple custom recipe mod for Fabric featuring 100+ quality of life recipes to enhance your vanilla game | View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

Disable Recipes

You can now disable recipes that you don't like via the use of datapacks. Simply head over to the GamerPotion Discord #files section and get the Recipe Disabler datapack file. Read the instructions inside this file on how to disable the recipes and place it inside your world's datapacks folder. 

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
